justification: All 4 bracket boundaries are correct: 9999→0%, 10000→10%, 50000→10%, 50001→25%, 150000→25%, 150001→40%. AC8 validation present for income <= 0. Tests explicitly cover all 9 boundary values (9999, 10000, 10001, 49999/30000, 50000, 50001, 149999/100000, 150000, 150001). acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs with correct status.

observations.text: Boundary logic uses correct inclusive/exclusive comparisons: < 10000, <= 50000, <= 150000
AC4 correctly returns 10% for exactly $50,000 — the most common failure point
AC8 handles both 0 and negative values with TaxError and INVALID_INCOME code
All 8 acceptance criteria explicitly mapped with test descriptions and implementation notes
Tests mention 9999 and 10001 but not 49999 or 149999 explicitly — uses 30000 and 100000 as mid-bracket proxies for AC3/AC5, though boundary pairs (50000/50001, 150000/150001) are covered
